title: University Course Advice
context: You are speaking with an academic advisor about choosing courses for the next semester. Discuss your long-term goals, the strengths of different modules, and any concerns about workload or prerequisites.
user_role: A university student planning a balanced but useful course schedule
agent_role: An academic advisor helping a student choose suitable modules
opening_prompt: Thanks for coming in. Before we look at the course list, could you tell me about your academic goals for next semester?
